title: abelmoschus divaricatus
intro: Abelmoschus divaricatus, also known as the Indian mallow, is a flowering plant belonging to the mallow family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. Its health benefits include treating various ailments such as diarrhea, dysentery, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from fever and respiratory issues. Abelmoschus divaricatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
